question: Based on the chart of website visitors over the 14‑day period, which statement about total visitors at the beginning versus the end of the period is most accurate?

options.A: Total visitors were greater during the first 7 days than during the last 7 days.
options.B: Total visitors were approximately equal in the first and last 7 days.
options.C: Total visitors were greater during the last 7 days than during the first 7 days.
options.D: It is not possible to compare totals for the first and last 7 days from this chart.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the last segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
